role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified lack of text; stayed within domain.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant species (Apiaceae, Acer, Betula) and biomes.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road surface and infrastructure (fences, lack of signs).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (fence color, camera generation) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the region (Europe) and the specific visual markers (Falu red fence, temperate flora) but failed to disambiguate between Sweden and Estonia, defaulting to Sweden due to the stronger cultural association of the fence color with Sweden.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of meadows, forests, and dirt road match image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of white umbellifers and deciduous canopy match image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of fence and road surface match image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Descriptions of fence style and image quality match image.

tournament_failure.failure_reasoning: Estonia was not in the candidate pool; the agents focused on Sweden, Norway, and Finland.
